programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

programme.title: Burning Ojai: Our Fire Story
programme.desc: Documenting one of the largest wildfires in California's history as well as the aftermath; interviews with residents of Ventura County affected by the devastation.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Ice on Fire
programme.desc: Visionaries and scientists work to mitigate climate change and minimize climate-related events, despite a rapidly warming planet.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Music Box
programme.sub-title: Jason Isbell: Running With Our Eyes Closed
programme.desc: Jason Isbell's musical evolution and creative process as he goes into the studio to record his album "Reunions" with his band, The 400 Unit; Isbell lays bare his childhood, struggles with addiction and relationships, funneling it into his music.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
programme.desc: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

programme.title: Music Box: DMX: Don't Try To Understand
programme.desc: Focusing on a year in the life of Earl "DMX" Simmons, this documentary follows the late rapper through his 2019 comeback tour after serving a year in prison and uses archival materials to chronicle his struggle with addiction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Music Box: Wizkid: Long Live Lagos
programme.desc: Tracing the roots and global rise of Nigerian superstar Wizkid as he prepares for his first major stadium concert.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Alien 3
programme.desc: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Generation Por qué?
programme.desc: A woman pursues her acting dreams in New York City while enduring her very conservative parents.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
programme.desc: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
programme.desc: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.
